titleStmt.title: SII 18.366: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 366. (B.K. No. 30 of 1934-35.) ITGI, RANEBENUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Door-frame at the first entrance into the Virūpākshaliṅga temple.

summary.p: This undated record states that when Garuḍa-Pāṇḍyadēva was governing Nūrmubāḍa, his subordinate Heggaḍe Jannayya and Sātagauṁḍa and Kāḷagauṇḍa of Iṭṭage made a grant of land for the worship and offerings to god Virūpākshadēva (of Iṭṭage). The record is engraved in characters of the 12th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
© svasti śrīmatu garuḍapāṁḍyadēvaru nūṟuṁbāḍamaṁ duṣṭanigraha siṣṭapratipāla
naṁgeydu ṟaṭṭapaḷḷiya paṭṭaṇadoḷu sukhadiṁ rājjyaṁgeyvuttamire . tatpā
dapadmōpajīvi . heggaḍe jannayyaṁgaḷu Iṭṭageya sātagauṁḍa kāḷagauṁḍe nirddalliya virūpā
kṣadēvaraṁgabhōga pūje naivēdya naṁdādīvige jīrnnōḍdhārakkaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa Ere ma
ṇnūriṁge hōda baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍa ma
ttareraḍu . Ī dharmmavaṁ pratipaḷi
sidavaru gurukṣētradalu sahasra brā
hmaṇargge sāyira kavileya dāna mā
ḍida phalavaṁ paḍevaru ©

© svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭirvva
rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .

dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vāpi
dānātu srēyōnupālanā
t dānātsvarggamavāpnōti
pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ
Digital edition of SII 18.366 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
